name: Intimate Lessons | Mr. Lao
description:
"The best way to learn is through experiment and experience. Don't worry, I'll guide you." - Your advanced biology professor wants to help you learn all the human growth and development lessons your parents opted you out of each year so you can catch up to your peers and pass his class.

🚨 CW: taboo relationship, forbidden relationship, teacher x student, implied age difference, possible noncon and dubcon, manipulation, possible public or risky sex.

Anypov

How do people feel about the teacher angle instead of the Daddy angle? Also thinking of making a Daddy bot where he teaches you all this stuff at home one night. Do people want female versions of my bots?

Not a creators fault if the bot:

Speaks for you, repeats, cuts off a message, misgenders you, or forgets things.

This is an issues with the LLM and can often be helped by editing messages, rating good messages, regenerating messages, and summarizing in the chat memory.
creator: FliplineFinn
